description: The HollowConeMesh component is used to generate geometry for use with a MeshRenderer. This component generates a cone with a hollow center with internal geometry and a thickness. Similarly to the ConeMesh, the height of this procedural mesh is determined from the center of the object.

fields.Profile: the profile of the colors of vertices for this mesh.
fields.Height: how tall the hollow cone should be starting from the center
fields.OuterRadiusBase: the radius of the bottom ring that makes up the outer tube
fields.InnerRadiusBase: the radius if the bottom ring that makes up the inner tube
fields.OuterRadiusTop: the radius of the top ring that makes up the outer tube
fields.InnerRadiusTop: the radius of the top ring that makes up the inner tube
fields.Segments: how many faces make up each cylinder for the outside and inside.
fields.UVScale: how much to multiply the scale of the UVs for the procedural mesh.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to view the geometry. Don't forget to use a Material.
